Common mix-up: wave speed is measured in hertz. That would miss the wave speed focus.
Wrong link: wave speed does not depend on wavelength.
Misread idea: wave speed = frequency ÷ wavelength. This is not valid for wave speed.
questions.correctAnswer: This answer is correct because wave speed = frequency × wavelength.
